story_title: Fix Notification Delivery Issues on Android 14
description: Resolve the issue where push notifications fail to deliver on Android 14 devices, affecting approximately 8% of users.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user on Android 14 WHEN they have notification permissions enabled THEN they should receive all push notifications without failure.

description: Implement a three-tier priority system (urgent, normal, low) to visually differentiate notifications based on their urgency, ensuring critical alerts are not overlooked.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user receives notifications WHEN they are categorized by priority THEN the user should see notifications visually differentiated by urgency.

description: Develop a user preference page that allows admins to set granular notification preferences for different categories, enhancing customization.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN an admin accesses the notification preferences page WHEN they modify notification settings THEN the changes should be saved and reflected in user notifications.

description: Address accessibility issues in the notification center to ensure compliance with inclusive design practices, particularly for users with visual impairments.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user with visual impairments accesses the notification center WHEN they navigate through it THEN they should be able to access all notifications using assistive technologies.

description: Implement monitoring for the Notification Click-Through Rate (CTR) to assess the effectiveness of notification content and delivery.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the notification system is live WHEN notifications are sent THEN the CTR should be tracked and reported in analytics dashboards.

description: Implement tracking for the Unsubscribe Rate to monitor user fatigue and ensure notification relevance.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the notification system is live WHEN users opt out of notifications THEN the unsubscribe rate should be tracked and reported.

description: Optimize the notification delivery process to reduce latency from the current p95 of 340ms to under 200ms, improving user experience.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the notification delivery system is optimized WHEN notifications are sent THEN the p95 latency should be under 200ms.

description: Create documentation for the new notification preferences API endpoint to facilitate integration and usage by frontend components.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the API is developed WHEN developers access the documentation THEN they should find clear instructions and examples for using the notification preferences API.

description: Create a feature that batches low-priority notifications into a digest format, reducing notification fatigue for casual users.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user has low-priority notifications WHEN the digest feature is enabled THEN the user should receive a consolidated notification summary at optimal times.

story_title: Conduct A/B Testing on Notification Timing
description: Perform A/B testing on different notification delivery timings to identify optimal engagement windows for users, refining the ML model for notification batching.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN different notification timings are tested WHEN users receive notifications THEN engagement metrics should be analyzed to determine the best timing.

description: Implement a system for collecting user feedback on notification preferences and delivery to continuously improve the user experience.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the feedback system is live WHEN users provide feedback THEN the feedback should be collected and analyzed for improvements.

description: Instead of sending notifications individually, batch low-priority notifications into a digest delivered at optimal times based on user engagement patterns. The ML model should learn per-user preferences for delivery timing and grouping thresholds.
